_comment: WIN-DLG-004 -- Print dialog. Composition-PINNING contract (check-pdf-export-dialog-contract.py
pattern: a GtkNotebook-hosted GenericDialogController whose Material look is delivered entirely
by shared vcl parts already in definition.xml) over the real upstream Print dialog
(vcl/uiconfig/ui/printdialog.ui + vcl/source/window/printdlg.cxx + vcl/inc/printdlg.hxx). The
M-scope is pinning composition, never re-drawing controls.
The inventory row's second citation, sfx2/source/doc/printhelper.cxx, is SfxPrintHelper's
headless XPrintable/print-job dispatch -- orthogonal to the dialog's visual composition, which
lives in printdialog.ui + printdlg.cxx/.hxx. This contract anchors to the latter.
Pinned fail-closed: (1) the footer action-widgets help(-11)/ok(-5, label '_Print', has-default)/
cancel(-6) against the pushbutton extra="action" family (ok carries suggested-action ->
setAction(true)); (2) the Range radio trio order rbAllPages/rbRangePages/rbRangeSelection inside
GtkFrame frPrintRange against radiobutton/Entire at @corner-control (the real 24px square that
design 8.4 notes overrides the prototype's 20px circle); (3) the Printer field frPrinterName ->
printersbox GtkComboBoxText + setup GtkButton against combobox; (4) the Copies field copycount
GtkSpinButton bound to adjustment2 (lower 1 / upper 16384) against spinbox + spinbuttons (no tag
literally named 'spinbutton' exists); (5) the real FOUR-button preview pager btnFirst/backward/
forward/btnLast plus the pageedit GtkEntry and the totalnumpages GtkLabel '/ %n' -- correcting
design 8.4's simplified 'two 32px buttons + 1/3 label' prototype prose to the actual upstream
composition; (6) previewbox GtkCheckButton and the tabcontrol GtkNotebook against checkbox and
tabitem/tabpane/tabbody; (7) a read-only cross-check that printdialog.ui::PrintDialog stays
native-exclusion/KeepModal in dialog-notification-policy.csv.
Carved out spec-only (build-dependent, never promoted): the Writer/Calc/Impress runtime-injected
extra option tabs (PrinterOptionsHelper-driven, no static AddTabPage marker), preview-thumbnail /
GDI printer-DC rendering (excluded from file-widget theming by 8.1/8.4), the circular-radio /
32px-pager-icon prototype geometry, and the sub-766px adaptive stacking layout.
Source evidence only: runtime_verified is false throughout -- no native build, print-dialog pixels,
or runtime interaction are claimed.

modal_exclusions.note: The Print dialog collects input; it stays KeepModal and is never routed into the notification stack.

runtime_injected_tabs.note: The Writer/Calc/Impress app-specific extra option tabs are runtime-injected from PrinterOptionsHelper UNO property sequences with no static AddTabPage-equivalent marker; build-dependent, not pinned as a source-position check.

preview_thumbnail_rendering.note: The preview thumbnail is drawn through the Windows printer DC, explicitly excluded from file-widget theming by 8.1/8.4; out of scope even with a build.

prototype_geometry.note: The circular-radio and 32px-pager-icon prototype geometry is prototype-only; the native @corner-control square and the real four-button pager are authoritative.

adaptive_stacking.note: The sub-766px adaptive stacking layout is design-only; no source exists to pin build-free.
